regional_cost_note: Electricians in Palmerston North typically charge $85–$110/hr plus GST, in line with other regional NZ centres. Standard callout fees are $80–$120. Emergency after-hours work typically adds $120–$200 to the hourly rate.

businesses.name: John Leader Electrical
businesses.known_for: A cornerstone of the Palmerston North electrical industry for 40+ years; known for Healthy Homes compliance, switchboard upgrades, heat pump installation, and reliable residential service.

businesses.name: McNae Group
businesses.known_for: Full-service electrical contractor covering residential, commercial, and rural sectors; also offers heating, solar, and EV charging solutions under one roof.

businesses.name: Linc Electrical Limited
businesses.known_for: Residential and commercial electrician with 24/7 emergency availability; covers new builds, renovations, fault finding, and switchboard upgrades across Palmerston North.

businesses.name: SES Electrical Services
businesses.known_for: Specialists in security cameras, heat pump installation, solar power, and home automation alongside standard residential and commercial electrical work.

businesses.name: Hedley Electrical
businesses.known_for: Manawatu institution serving the region for 52+ years with a team of 7 electricians covering new builds, renovations, and service work of all sizes.

businesses.name: Hayds Electrical
businesses.known_for: Locally owned and operated since 2017, focused on quality domestic electrical services across the wider Manawatu with a strong reputation for reliability.

businesses.name: Dean Smith Pilling Electrical
businesses.known_for: Backed by 30+ years of experience delivering professional residential electrical services throughout the Manawatu; strong reputation for quality workmanship.

businesses.name: TKR Electrical
businesses.known_for: 50 years of industry experience covering Palmerston North, Levin, and the wider Manawatū for residential and commercial electrical installations and repairs.

businesses.name: Electro
businesses.known_for: Commercial and industrial electrical specialists serving the Manawatu with expertise in repairs, installation, and maintenance of large-scale electrical systems.

businesses.name: Nexus Energy
businesses.known_for: Powerco-approved contractor offering expert electrical services including solar installations, EV chargers, and grid connections across the Manawatu region.
